description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal, tailored suit with a collared shirt and lapel, exuding a business or upscale urban appearance. The figure has spiky, voluminous hair styled upward, and wears glasses, adding a modern, fashionable touch. The suit is well-fitted, with a jacket, trousers, and dress shoes, and the shirt collar is visible above the jacket. The hands are relaxed at the sides, and the overall build is average and proportional. The facial features are partially obscured by the hairstyle and glasses, but the figure maintains a composed, upright stance. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the attire suggests a professional or social event context.
description: A sharply dressed adult male in a formal suit with spiky hair and glasses, standing upright. The figure exudes a modern, professional urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full suit, glasses, and spiky hairstyle, with both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the volume of the hair, and the straight cut of the suit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit jacket, the spiky hair from behind, and the straight posture.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair, and suit details from the opposite angle.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and dress shoes
